RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0025 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Aisha Mensah Date of Birth: 08/11/1993 SSN (tokenized): TKN-886773 Annual Income: $145,000 Employer: Umbrella Co Loan Amount: $55,000 Term (months): 60 Branch: Berlin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN36155AL Kia Model 3 2021 EV CPO 41,000 VIN66442AL Honda F-150 2019 EV CPO 29,000 Authorized Signature: Aisha Mensah
